ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Stage_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Stage_Status__c, 'Completed'), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Possession / Handover'), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Project_Type__c, 'Villas'), OR( ISBLANK(Main_Door__c), ISBLANK(Main_Door_Sensor_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Sit_Out_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Sit_Out_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_No_of_Keys__c) ) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Project_Type__c, 'Apartments'), OR( ISBLANK(Main_Door__c), ISBLANK(Main_Door_Sensor_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Common_Bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Common_Bedroom_No_of_Keys__c) ) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Project_Type__c, 'Row House'), OR( ISBLANK(Main_Door_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Main_Door_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Guest_Bedroom_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_Master_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(FF_children_bedroom_No_Of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Basement_Door_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Basement_Door_No_of_Keys__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_Key_No__c), ISBLANK(Second_Floor_No_of_Keys__c) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All key-related fields must be filled in key handover section before marking stage as completed
